intro: Kleinia × kleiniiformis, also known as Klein's copper leaf, is a hybrid plant species of the genus Kleinia, belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant has been found to have various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can aid in wound healing and reducing the risk of infections. The bioactive constituents of Kleinia × kleiniiformis include flavonoids, saponins, and terpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. Klein's copper leaf is commonly used in herbal preparations such as tea, capsules, and tinctures to take advantage of its health benefits, particularly in traditional medicine and natural remedies.
